task_completion.description: Calculate the expiration urgency for each food item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new column (e.g., 'Days Until Expiration' or 'Urgency') is added to the spreadsheet containing numerical values representing the difference between the expiration date and the current/donation date.

task_completion.description: Apply conditional formatting for critical food safety warnings (<= 3 days).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells in the expiration urgency column with values of 3 or less have a red background color.

task_completion.description: Apply conditional formatting for moderate food safety warnings (4-7 days).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells in the expiration urgency column with values between 4 and 7 (inclusive) have a yellow background color.

task_completion.description: Sort the inventory by priority (expiration urgency).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data rows are sorted in ascending order based on the expiration urgency column, with the lowest numbers (most urgent) appearing at the top of the list.

task_completion.description: Save the processed inventory to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/' and filename 'fridge_inventory.xlsx', or the LibreOffice Calc window title updating to 'fridge_inventory.xlsx'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Calc GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Calc application interface, rather than a terminal window running Python/pandas scripts to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent used actual spreadsheet features rather than manually painting cells or manually retyping sorted data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of conditional formatting dialog boxes, sorting dialog boxes, or formula bars being used during the trajectory.

integrity.description: The original dataset of 18 food items was maintained and not replaced with dummy data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet contains the original food items (e.g., Milk, Yogurt, Lettuce, Cheese, Bread, Eggs) and dates from Jan-Feb 2024, rather than a completely different or truncated list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses a synthetic dataset of 18 hardcoded food items (including Milk, Yogurt, Lettuce, Cheese, Bread, Eggs, etc.) with dates ranging from Jan-Feb 2024. The agent must calculate a 'Days Until Expiration' column. Conditional formatting rules must be applied: Red for <= 3 days, and Yellow for 4-7 days. The inventory must be sorted in ascending order by expiration urgency. The final file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/fridge_inventory.xlsx'.
